com.mentor.chs.plugin.library

Interface IXLibraryImportModifierPlugin<O extends IXLibraryObject>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXObjectModifierPlugin<O>, IXPlugin

    public interface IXLibraryImportModifierPlugin<O extends IXLibraryObject>
extends IXObjectModifierPlugin<O>
    Any library import modifier plugin should implement this interface and library import routine will call the plugin to get all the modifiers which needs to be applied during import process. Example of such modifier is IXLibraryModificationHistoryProvider

    Sample usage of the plugin implementation: 

                    public class LibraryCustomImportPluginHistory implements IXLibraryImportModifierPlugin<IXLibraryObject>{
                        public IXModifier[] getModifiers()
                        {
                                return new IXModifier[]{   new DeviceModificationHistoryProvider(), new ConnectorModificationHistoryProvider()  };
                        }
                };
    See Also:
    IXModifier, IXObjectModifierPlugin, IXLibraryModificationHistoryProvider

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.modifier.IXObjectModifierPlugin

        getModifiers

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion
